title: Herobrine Is Here.
description: Venture into the depths of this modpack, but beware, for Herobrine's gaze never wavers. Embrace the chilling atmosphere of Halloween as you face the unknown in the shadows. Summon a shrine and light it to get the “full experience”.
body:
# Herobrine Is Here. Venture into the depths of this modpack, but beware, for Herobrine's gaze never wavers. Embrace the chilling atmosphere of Halloween as you face the unknown in the shadows. Build a shrine and light it to get the “full experience”. Uncover the secrets that lie within the darkness and truly understand the extent of Herobrine's reach. Only then will you experience the true terror of Herobrine's watchful gaze. As you immerse yourself in this bone-chilling adventure, the atmosphere grows colder, the shadows deeper, and the fear more palpable. Prepare to confront the unknown and embrace the heart of darkness this Halloween with our awesome modpack! This modpack comes with full Iris and Optifine shader support (e.x. BSL shaders) and Optifine resource pack support (e.x. Fresh Animations). Our modpack doesn't come with any shaders.
Full list of mods and resource packs:
- Architectury API - CIT Resewn - Classic Fog - Cloth Config API - Enhanced Block Entities - Entity Culling - Fabric API - From The Fog - Golden Days Base - Iris Shaders - Lithium - Mod Menu - Nostalgic Fishing - Nostalgic Tweaks - Reese's Sodium Options - Sodium - Sodium Extra - Void Fog - [EMF] Entity Model Features - [ETF] Entity Texture Features
